name: Chinese Style Sea Scallops
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Thinly sliced Napa cabbage (or bok choy)
1 cup Shiitake mushrooms or common mushrooms, sliced
2 tbsp Light reduced sodium soy sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok or large skillet, stir-fry broccoli and onion for 3 to 4 minutes in oil.
2. Add scallops, cabbage, snow peas, mushrooms, garlic, star anise, and coriander. Stir-fry for 2 to 3 minutes.
3. Pour in chicken broth, vinegar, and soy sauce. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, until scallops are cooked through and vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
5. Mix cornstarch with cold water. Stir the mixture into the boiling sauce and continue cooking until thickened. Remove from heat and let stand for 2 to 3 minutes.
6. Stir in NutraSweet Spoonful and serve over rice.
